#5 JDG WICK. CSR MARCIA HOLMES. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 9:51 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. MICHAEL ROSSOFF,COUNSEL PRESENT FOR PLTF; DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP WAS READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY THE DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRELL, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1735 STEINER STREET, #158, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT STAYED IF DEFT PAYS PLTF $1,500.00 BY CERTIFIED CHECK OR MONEY ORDER ON OCT 1, 1993 5PM; $1,012.75 FINAL RENT PLUS $500.00 ATTY FEES AT $250.00 PER MONTH STARTING NOV 1, 1993 ENDING APR 1, 1994 WITH FINAL INSTALL OF $262.75 NO STAYS OF EVICTION. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
